vpanel.header: 返回上一级

report.title: 资源型客户经理业绩明细

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: select dtl.MEASURE_DT ,dtl.EMP_ID ,dtl.EMP_NM ,dtl.VUCH_NBR ,dtl.CST_ID ,dtl.CST_NM ,dtl.OPEN_DT ,dtl.ORG_ID ,dtl.ORG_NM ,dtl.RATIO ,dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL ,dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL ,dtl.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL ,dtl.M_PROFIT ,(dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,dtl.BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_VUCH_DETAIL dtl WHERE {#condition#} order by dtl.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_ID , BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_ID in ('AA', 'BB') order by BIZ_TYPE_ID}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

vpanel.header: 返回上一级

report.title: 资源型客户经理业绩明细

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: select dtl.MEASURE_DT ,dtl.EMP_ID ,dtl.EMP_NM ,dtl.VUCH_NBR ,dtl.CST_ID ,dtl.CST_NM ,dtl.OPEN_DT ,dtl.ORG_ID ,dtl.ORG_NM ,dtl.RATIO ,dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL ,dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL ,dtl.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL ,(dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,dtl.M_PROFIT ,dtl.BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_VUCH_DETAIL dtl WHERE {#condition#} order by dtl.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_ID , BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_ID in ('AA', 'BB') order by BIZ_TYPE_ID}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

vpanel.header: 返回上一级

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: select dtl.MEASURE_DT ,dtl.EMP_ID ,dtl.EMP_NM ,dtl.VUCH_NBR ,dtl.CST_ID ,dtl.CST_NM ,dtl.OPEN_DT ,dtl.ORG_ID ,dtl.ORG_NM ,dtl.RATIO ,dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL ,dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL ,dtl.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL ,(dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,dtl.M_PROFIT ,dtl.BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_VUCH_DETAIL dtl WHERE {#condition#} order by dtl.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_ID , BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_ID in ('AA', 'BB') order by BIZ_TYPE_ID}

report.title: 资源型客户经理业绩明细

col.label: 存量客户考核基期日均
存量客户月日均新增额

select.value: select dtl.MEASURE_DT ,dtl.EMP_ID ,dtl.EMP_NM ,dtl.VUCH_NBR ,dtl.CST_ID ,dtl.CST_NM ,dtl.OPEN_DT ,dtl.ORG_ID ,dtl.ORG_NM ,dtl.RATIO ,dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL ,dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL ,dtl.XZ_MTH_AVG_BAL ,(dtl.CL_MTH_AVG_BAL-dtl.CL_KHJQ_AVG_BAL) as CL_MTH_AVG_ADD ,dtl.M_PROFIT ,dtl.BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T3_RESOURCE_MANAGER_VUCH_DETAIL dtl WHERE {#condition#} order by dtl.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_ID , BIZ_TYPE_NM from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_ID in ('AA', 'BB') order by BIZ_TYPE_ID}
